message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for Series sub/mul/div (3 cases)

Append 3 live-pandas oracle tests covering Series binary arithmetic
(complementing the existing Series.add coverage in
live_oracle_series_add_*):

- series_sub_aligned: 3-element subtraction (10-1=9, 20-2=18, 30-3=27)
- series_mul_aligned: 3-element multiplication (2*4=8, 3*7=21, 5*11=55)
- series_div_aligned: 3-element division (10/2=5, 20/4=5, 30/5=6)

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
left.{sub,mul,div}(right)), runs the Rust Series.{sub,mul,div}_
with_policy, and asserts parity via compare_series_expected.
SeriesSub / SeriesMul / SeriesDiv were already wired through the
Series response branch; this fills the live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-nja5f]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
